nasb.text: But do not resort to Bethel And do not come to Gilgal, Nor cross over to Beersheba; For Gilgal will certainly go into captivity And Bethel will come to trouble.

esv.text: but do not seek Bethel, and do not enter into Gilgal or cross over to Beersheba; for Gilgal shall surely go into exile, and Bethel shall come to nothing.”

cnv.text: 不要去伯特利尋求我， 不要去吉甲， 也不要過去別是巴。 因為吉甲必被擄掠， 伯特利必化為烏有。”

ccb.text: 不要去伯特利求问， 不要进入吉甲， 也不要前往别示巴， 因为吉甲人必被掳去， 伯特利也必化为乌有。”
